offer: For construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month, missed permit renewals cause project delays. We send timely renewal alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Share in community forums for construction tools
try_it: Let users try tracking on 1-3 permits
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual tracking
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing permit data
